Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Blouse)

Fabric: Made from premium quality, rich jacquard fabric.

Length: Unstitched blouse piece measures 0.80 meters, allowing for custom boutique tailoring.

Style: Crafted to perfectly complement the saree with its intricate woven patterns.

Bottom (Saree)

Fabric: Woven from heavy, rich cotton silk material that offers a graceful drape and premium feel.

Design & Pattern: Features an all-over premium digital print design paired with an exquisite, heavy jacquard border layout.

Length: Traditional saree length measures 5.50 meters.

Details: Finished beautifully with fancy tassels along the pallu edge for an added touch of charm.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
